changelog: 1.5 (2026-07-19): Test-wiring smoke fixture (checks #27-#30). Expect [OK] exit 0 with EXACTLY these warnings: #27 on TSK-005 (subject do_work built by TSK-002, edge missing - deps point at the TSK-003 absorber instead), #28 on TSK-005 (no dep on the TSK-004 test-infrastructure task), #29 on TSK-001 (no TASKS/TSK-NNN cross-file edge), #30 on TSK-006 (non-gating TST-102's eval_nongating marker mentioned nowhere) and #30 scaffold-side (no system scaffold task mentions marker registration).

overview: Deliberately mis-wired test edges over a correct task inventory: the impl/infra tasks are right, the test wiring is the smell under test.

tasks.title: Scaffold the svc package
tasks.description: Create the src/svc package skeleton and test layout. DELIBERATELY missing the TASKS/TSK-001 cross-file edge (check #29).

tasks.title: Implement do_work
acceptance: a valid job yields a completed result

tasks.title: Implement aggregate_results
acceptance: a batch of results yields one summary

tasks.title: Build the shared test infrastructure
tasks.description: Build the deliverables TEST-STRATEGY.shared_infrastructure declares. Fixture strategy (verbatim): 'Shared factories in tests/factories.py.' Mock policy (verbatim): 'Real in-process deps; no network in unit tests.' Files: tests/factories.py.
acceptance: pytest collects with the shared factories importable

tasks.title: Author TST-101 (do_work unit test)
tasks.description: Author the do_work happy-path unit test. MIS-WIRED on purpose: depends on the TSK-003 absorber, not the TSK-002 subject impl (check #27) and not the TSK-004 infra task (check #28).

directives: Arrange a queued job; act do_work(); assert the result record.
test_spec.acceptance: do_work returns a completed result for a valid job.

acceptance: the test fails before TSK-002 and passes after

tasks.title: Author TST-102 (aggregation quality eval)
tasks.description: Author the non-gating aggregation eval. Correctly wired (subject + infra deps) but never mentions the exclusion marker anywhere (check #30 task-side material - do not name the marker in this description or the check is satisfied by accident).

directives: Run the aggregator on the golden batch; grade the summary.
